# zstack_ssh_key_pair (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage SSH key pairs in ZStack. An SSH key pair stores a public key that can be attached to VM instances for key-based authentication. Only importing existing public keys is supported (not generating new key pairs).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the SSH key pair.
- `public_key` (String) The SSH public key content.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the SSH key pair.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier (UUID) of the SSH key pair.
